title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Jared Sires, GTM Product Manager at Anthropic, built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant that uses the Claude API and Claude Code to draft personalized customer replies for sales representatives, reducing administrative burden.
